Class AKofiPurchase

java.lang.Object
dev.chojo.aether.kofi.pojo.AKofiPurchase
public abstract class AKofiPurchase extends Object
Represents a purchase made on kofi. This maybe be a subscription or a lifetime purchase. The Mail hash might have a matching AMailEntry.hash()

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    AKofiPurchase(String mailHash, String transactionId, String key, Type type, long subscriptionId, Instant expiresAt)
    Creates a new AKofiPurchase that is not associated to a guild

    Renew a kofi purchase that represents a subscription Sets the expiration date to 32 days from now

  • Constructor Details

    • AKofiPurchase

      public AKofiPurchase(String mailHash, String transactionId, String key, Type type, long subscriptionId, Instant expiresAt)
      Creates a new AKofiPurchase that is not associated to a guild
      Parameters:
      mailHash - mail hash of the purchase
      transactionId - transaction id of the purchase
      key - Key of the product. For purchases, it's the shop shortcode. For subscriptions, it's the tier name.

    • AKofiPurchase

      public AKofiPurchase(String mailHash, String transactionId, String key, Type type, long subscriptionId, Instant expiresAt, long guildId)

  • Method Details

    • mailHash

      public String mailHash()

    • transactionId

      public String transactionId()

    • key

      public String key()

    • type

      public Type type()

    • subscriptionId

      public long subscriptionId()
      The is of the subscription associated with this purchase The id has to match a Subscription

    • expiresAt

      public Instant expiresAt()
      The time the purchase expires

    • guildId

      public long guildId()
      Guild id associated with this purchase
      Returns:
      guild id or 0 if not assigned

    • assignToGuild

      public abstract boolean assignToGuild(long guildId)
      Assign a kofi purchase to a guild This associates the purchase with a guild id

    • unassignFromGuild

      public abstract boolean unassignFromGuild()
      Unassign a kofi purchase from a guild This keeps the purchase but reverts the associated guild id to 0

    • renew

      public abstract void renew()
      Renew a kofi purchase that represents a subscription Sets the expiration date to 32 days from now

    • delete

      public abstract void delete()
      Delete the kofi purchase

    • isValid

      public boolean isValid()
      Check if the purchase is still valid.
      Returns:
      true if the purchase is still valid
